The '''28th Flight''' was a [[Flight group/Legends|flight]] [[Battle group/Legends|group]] of [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class]] [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] in the service of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy's]] 28th [[Flight group/Legends|Flight]] was comprised of [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] [[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Blue|dark-blue]] and [[Gray|light-gray]] that—as with the Vulture [[Droid/Legends|droids]] of [[31st Flight]]—had less accurate weapons, but greater defensive capabilities, than the [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] of [[72nd Flight]] and [[128th Flight]].<ref name="mini" />

==History==
The 28th Flight group of droid [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="mini" />

==Behind the scenes==
28th Flight was represented with a miniature in the [[Star Wars PocketModel TCG: Base Set|initial release]] of the ''[[Star Wars PocketModel TCG]]'' in [[June]] [[2007]].<ref name="mini" />
